hero.title: UGC made easy.
hero.subtitle: Find and hire UGC creators and influencers to create unique content for your brand.

features.title: Simplified UGC Management
features.description: Cut out the back-and-forth emails and ghosting. Vidovo makes managing user-generated content easy and efficient, so you can focus on what matters—building your brand. Control the entire process from creation to final approval in one place, ensuring your content is always on point and ready to go.

features.title: Scalable Content Creation
features.description: Scale your content production without scaling your costs. Vidovo connects you with a diverse pool of creators who specialize in generating high-quality content across multiple channels, ensuring your brand is everywhere it needs to be.

features.title: Reliable Turnaround Times
features.description: Count on Vidovo for dependable content delivery. Within 10 days, you'll have high-quality, ready-to-use creative assets from our vetted creators, with many projects delivered even sooner.

secondarySection.title: Full Content Ownership
secondarySection.description: You own all the content created — no strings attached. Use it how you want, when you want.
